landing_page.title: Model SDK API Reference
landing_page.intro: The Model SDK exposes the `afe` Python package, which the SiMa.ai Neat toolchain uses to import, quantize, simulate, and compile models into the MPK format consumed by the runtime. The pages below are auto-generated from the `afe.apis` source via [griffe](https://mkdocstrings.github.io/griffe/); each module page lists the classes, functions, and constants it exports along with their signatures.

groups.label: Compilation
groups.intro: Drive a compilation job end-to-end, from a calibrated network to MPK artifacts.

groups.label: Model Lifecycle
groups.intro: Load, save, execute, and quantize models in AFE's internal representation.

groups.label: Versioned Public APIs
groups.intro: Stable and pre-release surfaces for importing, quantizing, executing, and simulating models. New integrations should target the release API and migrate forward; the pre-release API exposes experimental capabilities ahead of stabilization.

groups.label: Execution & Analysis
groups.intro: Simulate compiled models and analyze tensor statistics.

groups.label: Transforms
groups.intro: Pre- and post-processing tensor transformations that can be attached to a model's inputs or outputs.

groups.label: Types & Error Handling
groups.intro: Shared type definitions, error-handling controls, and internal exception sanitization used across the AFE APIs.
